title.ko: 그래픽 데이터의 판독 (이미지 또는 비디오 인식 또는 이해 G06V); 데이터의 표현; 기록 매체; 기록 매체 처리
title.en: GRAPHICAL DATA READING (image or video recognition or understanding G06V); PRESENTATION OF DATA; RECORD CARRIERS; HANDLING RECORD CARRIERS

definition.ko: 판독 그래프 G06K11/00 수동 쓰기 또는 추적 구성원의 위치를 신호로 변환하는 것 G06K11/00 출력 데이터의 영구적인 시각적 표시 G06K15/00 마킹, 인쇄 G06K1/00, G06K3/00 검증 G06K5/00 감지 G06K7/00 운반 G06K13/00 상기 그룹의 둘 이상에서 다루는 작업의 조합 G06K17/00 기록 매체, 펀치 카드 G06K19/00, G06K21/00

title.en: Methods or arrangements for marking the record carrier in digital fashion
by punching
controlled by sensing markings on the record carrier being punched
High-speed punches, e.g. controlled by electric computer
Manually-controlled devices
Card punches
Tape punches
otherwise than by punching
by transferring data from a similar or dissimilar record carrier
by reproducing data from one punched card on to one or more punched cards without the code representation, i.e. duplicating
by transferring data from one type of record carrier on to another type of record carrier, e.g. from magnetic tape to punched card
Simultaneous marking of record carrier and printing-out of data, e.g. printing-punch
Simultaneous marking and printing on different record carriers, e.g. on different types of record carrier
Methods or arrangements for printing of data in the shape of alphanumeric or other characters from a record carrier, e.g. interpreting, printing-out from a magnetic tape
Translating markings on a record carrier into printed data on the same record carrier, i.e. interpreting
Methods or arrangements for verifying the correctness of markings on a record carrier; Column-detection devices
the verifying forming a part of the marking action
Verifying the alignment of markings

title.ko: 기록 매체를 감지하기 위한 방법 또는 장치 (디지털 방식으로 기록 매체를 표시하기 위한 방법 또는 장치 G06K1/00; 패턴 인식 G06F18/00; 이미지 또는 비디오 인식 또는 이해를 위한 장치 G06V10/00; 문자 인식, 디지털 잉크 인식 또는 문서 지향 이미지 기반 패턴 인식 G06V30/00)
title.en: Methods or arrangements for sensing record carriers  (methods or arrangements for marking the record carrier in digital fashion G06K0001000000; pattern recognition G06F0018000000; arrangements for image or video recognition or understanding G06V0010000000; character recognition, recognising digital ink or document-oriented image-based pattern recognition G06V0030000000)
Details
Aligning or centring of the sensing device with respect to the record carrier
Synchronisation of sensing process
by pneumatic or hydraulic means, e.g. sensing punched holes with compressed air; by sonic means
by mechanical means, e.g. by pins operating electric contacts
by means which conduct current when a mark is sensed or absent, e.g. contact brush for a conductive mark
by means detecting the change of an electrostatic or magnetic field, e.g. by detecting change of capacitance between electrodes
by electromagnetic radiation, e.g. optical sensing; by corpuscular radiation
using a selected wavelength, e.g. to sense red marks and ignore blue marks
using light without selection of wavelength, e.g. sensing reflected white light

title.ko: 그래프 판독 또는 기계적 매개변수의 패턴 변환을 위한 방법 또는 장치, 예. 힘 또는 존재, 전기 신호의 것 (패턴 인식과 결합된 것 G06F18/00; 이미지 또는 비디오 인식 또는 이해를 위한 장치 G06V10/00; 문자 인식, 디지털 잉크 인식 또는 문서 지향 이미지 기반 패턴 인식 G06V30/00)
title.en: Methods or arrangements for graph-reading or for converting the pattern of mechanical parameters, e.g. force or presence, into electrical signals (combined with pattern recognition G06F0018000000;arrangements for image or video recognition or understanding G06V0010000000;character recognition, recognising digital ink or document-oriented image-based pattern recognition G06V0030000000)
Automatic curve followers
using an auxiliary scanning pattern
Devices for converting the position of a manually-operated writing or tracing member into an electrical signal

title.ko: 어떤 위치에서 다른 위치로 기록매체의 이송, 예. 스택에서 천공기계로의 기록매체의 이송
title.en: Conveying record carriers from one station to another, e.g. from stack to punching mechanism (conveying record carriers combined with another operation, e.g. with reading G06K0017000000)
the record carrier having longitudinal dimension comparable with transverse dimension, e.g. punched card
Details, e.g. flaps in card-sorting apparatus
Capstans; Pinch rollers
Guiding cards; Checking correct operation of card-conveying mechanisms
Aligning cards
Checking presence, absence, correct position, or moving status of cards
Transporting of cards between stations
with continuous movement
with intermittent movement; Braking or stopping movement
Feeding or discharging cards
from magazine to conveying arrangement
using mechanical means
using pneumatic means
from conveying arrangement to magazine
Card magazines, e.g. pocket, hopper
Handling flexible sheets, e.g. cheques
the record carrier being longitudinally extended, e.g. punched tape
Details
Capstans; Pinch rollers
Guiding of record carriers; Recognising end of record carrier
Winding-up or unwinding of record carriers; Driving of record carriers
continuously
intermittently

title.ko: 출력데이터의 영구가시표시를 작성하기 위한 장치(다른 동작과 결합된 인쇄 또는 플로팅(plotting)(예. 이송을 가지는 것) G06K 17/00)
title.en: Arrangements for producing a permanent visual presentation of the output data (printing or plotting combined with another operation, e.g. with conveying, G06K0017000000)
using printers
by rack-type printers
by type-wheel printers
by continuously-rotating-type-wheel printers, e.g. rotating-type-drum printers
by flight printing with type font moving in the direction of the printed line, e.g. chain printers
by matrix printers
by photographic printing
by electrographic printing, e.g. xerography; by magnetographic printing
Means for paper feeding or form feeding
using plotters

title.ko: 메인그룹 G06K 1/00 ～ G06K 15/00의 2개 이상의 메인 그룹에 포함 되는 장치를 공동 시키기 위한 방법 또는 장치, 예. 이송 및 읽기 동작과 공동 하는 자동 카드 파일
title.en: Methods or arrangements for effecting co-operative working between equipments covered by two or more of main groups G06K0001000000-G06K0015000000, e.g. automatic card files incorporating conveying and reading operations

title.ko: 적어도 그 일부에 디지털 마크가 기록되게끔 설계되고 또한 기계로 사용하는 기록매체
title.en: Record carriers for use with machines and with at least a part designed to carry digital markings
characterised by the selection of materials, e.g. to avoid wear during transport through the machine
characterised by the shape

title.ko: 디지털 마킹의 종류에 특징이 있는 것, 예. 모양, 성질, 코드
title.en: characterised by the kind of the digital marking, e.g. shape, nature, code
the carrier being marginally punched or notched, e.g. having elongated slots

title.ko: 도전성마크, 인쇄회로 또는 반도체 회로요소를 갖는 기록매체 예, 신용 또는 ID카드(전화기로부터의 호출을 허가받기 위해 부호화된 카드를 사용하는 것 H04M1/675)
title.en: Record carriers with conductive marks, printed circuits or semiconductor circuit elements, e.g. credit or identity cards (using a coded card to authorise calls from a telephone set H04M0001675000)
with integrated circuit chips

title.ko: 회로용의 특별한 배치, 예. 메모리내의 식별코드를 보호하기 위한 것(컴퓨터메모리의 부정한 사용에 대한 보호 G06F 12/14)
title.en: Special arrangements for circuits, e.g. for protecting identification code in memory (protection against unauthorised use of computer memory G06F0012140000)
Constructional details, e.g. mounting of circuits in the carrier

title.ko: 동일기록매체에서 다른 종류의 마킹을 사용하는 것 예, 하나는 광학적 수단 다른 하나는 자기적 수단에 의해 독취되는 것
title.en: using markings of different kinds in the same record carrier, e.g. one marking being sensed by optical and the other by magnetic means

title.ko: 적어도 하나의 종류의 기록 마크의 확인, 예. 신용 또는 ID 카드 (그러한 것에 의하여 동작되는 기구 내에서의 부호화된 ID 신용카드의 확인 G07F17/12)
title.en: at least one kind of marking being used for authentication, e.g. of credit or identity cards (verification of coded identity or credit cards in mechanisms actuated by them G07F0007120000)
the marking being sensed by magnetic means
the marking being sensed by radiation
the marking being a hologram or diffraction grating
Constructional details

title.ko: 수동 또는 기계로 처리할 수 있도록 설계된 천공 카드에서 정보 검색 (G06K19/00이 우선; 재스캔에 의한 오류 감지 또는 수정 G06K9/03; 카드 운반 매커니즘의 올바른 작동 확인 G06K13/06); 이러한 카드를 처리하기 위한 장치, 예. 표시 또는 수정
title.en: Information retrieval from punched cards designed for manual use or handling by machine  (G06K0019000000 takes precedence; detection or correction of errors by rescanning patterns G06V0030000000; checking correct operation of card-conveying mechanisms G06K0013060000); Apparatus for handling such cards, e.g. marking or correcting
in which coincidence of markings is sensed mechanically, e.g. by needle
in which coincidence of markings is sensed optically, e.g. peek-a-boo system
Apparatus or tools adapted for slotting or otherwise marking information-retrieval cards
Apparatus or tools for correcting punching or slotting errors
